raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California produces approximately 4% of the world's olive oil from over 75 varieties of olives.",
    "Some olive oil products labeled as 'California' have been found to contain as little as 14 percent of Californian olive oil.",
    "AB 535 makes it illegal to falsely represent that an olive oil is produced entirely from olives grown within California when it is not.",
    "AB 535 prohibits representations indicating that an olive oil was produced from olives grown in a specific region of California unless at least 85% of the olive oil was produced from olives grown in that region.",
    "The California Olive Oil Commission has identified several brands misleadingly using a California-related name on their labels that imply only California-grown olive oil is contained within the product.",
    "The demand for California olive oil is steadily increasing due to the state’s reputation for producing high-quality olive oils."
  ]
}
```
